creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to var from comment #5)
One of my workstations is ASUS KGPE-D16 from 2008 (so not much newer, although it uses CPUs from 2012). It also doesn't have UEFI, although it can use GPT.

Anyway, the point is, you can run newer FreeBSD on such hardware. As for seamonkey, it was removed in https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=505753 due to security issues.
